name: Htm
description_short: This is not a financial services company. The website is CorelDRAW's technical documentation explaining how to open .HTM file format with their graphic design software.
description_long: CRITICAL FINDING: 'Htm' does not exist as a financial services company. The provided URL points to CorelDRAW's (a graphic design software company owned by Alludo) technical support page explaining the .HTM file format and how to open it using CorelDRAW software. HTM/HTML is a hypertext markup language file format used for web page construction, not a financial product or service. The website contains only technical documentation about file format specifications and CorelDRAW's file compatibility features. There is no company named 'Htm' offering payday alternatives, loans, credit services, or any consumer finance product. This appears to be a data entry error or misidentification. The categorization as 'payday-alternatives' is factually incorrect based on available website content. No financial services, lending terms, APR rates, application processes, or consumer finance offerings are present on this URL. The website exclusively discusses graphic design software capabilities and privacy cookie preferences for CorelDRAW's marketing website.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
